Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Gene Marchi.

The sale was confirmed at $505,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $665,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order).

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Sandra Petritsch CSR#11684. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
